faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Products
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about our security products.
faq.q1: What web development services do you offer?
faq.a1: We offer high-quality secure website and web application development, with security built in from the design stage. We use industry best practices and modern technologies to deliver robust, protected applications.
faq.q2: What is included in the security training?
faq.a2: Our training covers everything from digital security basics to advanced use of security tools. It includes hands-on practice, completion certificates and ongoing support after the course.
faq.q3: How does secure AI training work?
faq.a3: We teach you to use artificial intelligence tools responsibly without exposing sensitive data. You will learn anonymization techniques, privacy best practices and how to implement AI safely in your company.
faq.q4: What is included in attack prevention services?
faq.a4: It includes vulnerability analysis, implementation of preventive measures, continuous monitoring, firewall configuration and intrusion detection systems. We offer custom plans based on your company size.
faq.a5: We provide fast 24/7 response to security incidents. Our team analyzes the attack, contains the threat, restores affected systems and provides a detailed report with recommendations to prevent future incidents.
faq.a6: Yes, we offer customized business plans that combine multiple services. Contact our team for a free consultation and a quote tailored to your organization's needs.

web_dev.name: Secure Web and App Development
web_dev.description: We create high-quality websites and applications with built-in security by design. We use the latest technologies and industry best practices to ensure an exceptional and secure product.

sec_training.name: Digital Security and Tool Training
sec_training.description: Comprehensive training program on digital security and proper use of protection tools. Learn how to protect your information and privacy using the best tools on the market.

ai_training.name: Secure AI Training: Usage without Data Exposure
ai_training.description: Learn to harness the power of artificial intelligence without compromising your data security. This training teaches you anonymization techniques and safe LLM usage to boost productivity safely.
